languages.text: "Только что сменили на посту господина Изимонда и его блюстителей. Командир он дельный: у него каждый по струнке ходит, лишний раз головы не повернет. Только строит из себя высокородного — а мои ребята такое на дух не переносят. Вот и не вышло у нас дружбы".
languages.translation_comment:
Зарков
Начинает играть DL_KnowIzimondWatch и Obj1_Add_IzimondOnWatch.

traits.locale_text: "Только что сменили на посту господина Изимонда и его блюстителей. Командир он дельный: у него каждый по струнке ходит, лишний раз головы не повернет. Только строит из себя высокородного — а мои ребята такое на дух не переносят. Вот и не вышло у нас дружбы".

languages.translation_comment:
Зарков
Начинает играть DL_KnowIzimondWatch и Obj1_Add_IzimondOnWatch.

languages.text: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."
languages.original_text: "Только что сменили на посту господина Изимонда и его блюстителей. Командир он дельный: у него каждый по струнке ходит, лишний раз головы не повернет. Только строит из себя высокородного — а мои ребята такое на дух не переносят. Вот и не вышло у нас дружбы".

traits.locale_text: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

"We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

"We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

languages.text: “我们刚刚接替苏尔贝克和他的执法者们。他算是个不错的指挥官，管得住人，也不爱挑刺。不过他老爱摆贵族架子，我的人可受不了这一套。所以我们关系一直不太好。”
languages.original_text: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

traits.locale_text: “我们刚刚接替苏尔贝克和他的执法者们。他算是个不错的指挥官，管得住人，也不爱挑刺。不过他老爱摆贵族架子，我的人可受不了这一套。所以我们关系一直不太好。”

languages.text: « On vient de relever Sauerback et ses prévôts. C'est un bon commandant : il tient la bride haute à tout le monde, mais il ne va pas chercher de prétextes pour faire des remontrances. Par contre, il se prend pour un noble et ça, ça nous hérisse le poil dans le régiment. C'est pour ça qu'on a quand même du mal à s'entendre. »
languages.original_text: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

traits.locale_text: « On vient de relever Sauerback et ses prévôts. C'est un bon commandant : il tient la bride haute à tout le monde, mais il ne va pas chercher de prétextes pour faire des remontrances. Par contre, il se prend pour un noble et ça, ça nous hérisse le poil dans le régiment. C'est pour ça qu'on a quand même du mal à s'entendre. »

languages.text: "Sauerback ve infazcılarından nöbeti yeni devraldık. İyi bir komutandır. Herkesi hizada tutar ama şikâyet edecek bir şeyler bulmaya çalışmaz. Yine de kendini soylu gibi göstermeye çalışıyor, benimkilerin midesi bunu kaldırmıyor. Bu yüzden çok iyi anlaşamıyoruz."
languages.original_text: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

traits.locale_text: "Sauerback ve infazcılarından nöbeti yeni devraldık. İyi bir komutandır. Herkesi hizada tutar ama şikâyet edecek bir şeyler bulmaya çalışmaz. Yine de kendini soylu gibi göstermeye çalışıyor, benimkilerin midesi bunu kaldırmıyor. Bu yüzden çok iyi anlaşamıyoruz."

languages.text: «Acabamos de relevar a Sauerback y sus guardias. Es un comandante decente: los mantiene a todos a raya, pero tampoco va buscando cosas que recriminarles. Eso sí, se las da de noble y eso es algo que los míos no soportamos. Por eso no nos llevamos mejor».
languages.original_text: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

traits.locale_text: «Acabamos de relevar a Sauerback y sus guardias. Es un comandante decente: los mantiene a todos a raya, pero tampoco va buscando cosas que recriminarles. Eso sí, se las da de noble y eso es algo que los míos no soportamos. Por eso no nos llevamos mejor».

languages.text: "Wir haben nur Sauerback und seine Enforcer befreit. Er ist ein guter Commander: Hält alle bei der Stange und sucht nicht ständig das Haar in der Suppe. Er spielt allerdings gerne den Hochgeborenen, das mögen meine Jungs gar nicht. Deshalb kommen wir nicht besser miteinander aus."
languages.original_text: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben nur Sauerback und seine Enforcer befreit. Er ist ein guter Commander: Hält alle bei der Stange und sucht nicht ständig das Haar in der Suppe. Er spielt allerdings gerne den Hochgeborenen, das mögen meine Jungs gar nicht. Deshalb kommen wir nicht besser miteinander aus."

languages.text: 「サウアーバックと彼の部下を、我々が引き継いだ。彼は良い指揮官だ。部下を統率するが、不満を言うようなことはしない。しかし、高貴な身分を装う。我々には受け入れられない。だから、仲良くできないのだ。」
languages.original_text: "We just relieved Sauerback and his enforcers. He's a decent commander: keeps everyone in line, but doesn't go looking for things to gripe about. He tries to make himself out to be highborn, though, and my lot can't stomach that. That's why we don't get along better."

traits.locale_text: 「サウアーバックと彼の部下を、我々が引き継いだ。彼は良い指揮官だ。部下を統率するが、不満を言うようなことはしない。しかし、高貴な身分を装う。我々には受け入れられない。だから、仲良くできないのだ。」
